description: A number the audience should FEEL: count it up over the tangible referent, then hold on the referent alone to let it settle.
when_to_use: One big quantity with a concrete visual referent already on the scene. Scene 1 counts up over the scene's own still; scene 2 rests on related footage. Don't chain two stat-impacts back to back.

roles.note: related footage/still through the normal ladder; low energy
